metadata.name: ViewmodelOwnedState
metadata.description: Essay: the layout has no state; every mutation flows through a ViewModel. Four H2 sections covering the contract, testability, cross-platform parity, and the 'what about useState' FAQ. ~6-min read.

dataFlow.diagram:
flowchart TD
    VIEW[ViewmodelOwnedStateView] --> VM[ViewmodelOwnedStateViewModel]
    VM -- nextReadLinks --> VIEW

methods.name: onAppear
methods.description: Seed nextReadLinks from the module-scope NEXT_READ_ENTRIES catalog (two rows: next_data_binding -> /concepts/data-binding, next_hot_reload -> /concepts/hot-reload) and stamp currentLanguage from StringManager.language. Each row's titleKey / descriptionKey is resolved through StringManager with the concepts_viewmodel_owned_state_ namespace prefix.

methods.name: onNavigate
methods.description: Client-side navigation via router.push(url). Destinations are the spec-mapped concept URLs enumerated in transitions: /concepts, /concepts/data-binding, /concepts/hot-reload.

vars.name: nextReadLinks
vars.description: Two closing 'read next' cards pointing at /concepts/data-binding and /concepts/hot-reload. Seeded by onAppear from the NEXT_READ_ENTRIES static catalog and re-seeded by onToggleLanguage.

transitions.condition: url is a spec-mapped concept URL or /concepts

notes: Fourth live essay. Flipping CONCEPTS_ENTRIES row 3 to 'live' is the last step.
Closing next-reads: Data binding (already live), Hot reload (upcoming).
